name: volley-game-central
description: Volley Game Central - A platform for organizing volleyball games

scripts.tg-mini-app:dev: cd tg-mini-app && PREVIEW_HOST="${PREVIEW_HOST}" npm run dev
scripts.backend:dev: docker compose up -d postgres && cd backend && npm run dev
scripts.backend:dev:telegram: docker compose up -d postgres && cd backend && npm run dev:telegram
scripts.build: npm run backend:build && npm run tg-mini-app:build
